description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a colorful, pastel exterior palette. The structure is two stories tall, with large windows dominating the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front of the house is accented by two tall palm trees and a minimalist paved entryway, suggesting a warm, coastal or tropical setting. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels and others with smaller, more traditional windows. The roof appears to be flat and may include a rooftop terrace or garden area, as indicated by the visible greenery. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a pastel-colored exterior, surrounded by palm trees and a minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main facade with large windows, pastel colors, and two prominent palm trees flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the house, the flat roof, and the continuation of the pastel color scheme, with fewer windows visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simpler facade with smaller windows and a more muted color palette, as well as the flat roof and palm trees in the background.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the geometric forms, additional windows, and the integration of the palm trees into the landscape design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass door, no visible steps, flanked by palm trees and a paved approach
